regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Lower Hutt typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Lower Hutt trades often price at Wellington rates given the shared labour pool. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
